textByHash.ac435077fa457f39b979d68ced1cac0c67d5de70: I always knew people were wrong about me. I knew I would serve a higher purpose. I never cared what it was. I only cared that in doing so, I would be serving the will of Ralos.
textByHash.2a028431cb3150c8eac0edfba00375eaf2c164a0: I always knew people were wrong about me. I knew I would serve a higher purpose. I never cared what it was. I only cared that in doing so, I would be granted a place in Mictl.
textByHash.4ba84dbff455718cdff40b91dcbf0fee21fd70bf: I have served Ralos my whole life. I am his humble servant. It was he who guided me here so that I may serve his will.
textByHash.7b08b774de0f46f48a711c5d42bc9f29b533f8c5: The Final Dawn is an end, but also a beginning. It is when Ralos will use his holy fire to destroy this world so that he and Ranul can build a new one.
textByHash.a5953e7cc2b4cd9d9044b951bab86ace8129631b: The Final Dawn is an end, but also a beginning. It is when Ralos will use his holy fire to destroy this world. Then he and Ranul will guide us to Mictl.
